## Metadata

<!--
test_tags:
Possible values (multi-select allowed):
- @smoke
- @authentication
- @core

Example:
test_tags: @smoke,@core

test_type:
Possible values (multi-select allowed):
- all
- authentication
- dashboard
- organizations
- incidents

Example:
test_type: authentication,dashboard

related_pr_id:
Use the PR number of a related PR (example: 123). Use 0 if none.
-->
